utterance: review this PR and find the worst issues
_weight_rationale: critic is quality-judging — the goal (find real issues) matters more than the exact process

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/general-critic/SKILL.md before reviewing; the skill defines the HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity taxonomy
the agent should classify findings by HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity per the skill, with explicit thresholds (HIGH = blocker; MEDIUM = should-fix; LOW = nice-to-have)
the agent should loop on HIGH findings until none remain, per the general-critic skill's loop-until-clean protocol
the review should name specific findings with file paths, line numbers, and concrete remediation — not vague 'consider improving' suggestions
the review should surface ≥1 substantive issue (correctness, security, performance, or design flaw), not just style nits

reference_solution: Agent reads general-critic/SKILL.md, applies HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW taxonomy, identifies at least one HIGH issue (e.g. unsanitized input, race condition, missing error handling), reports file:line + remediation, loops until no HIGH remains.
